message:
🐛 Fix 3 nightly failures: gosec G204, ai-ml timeouts, health checks (#10302)

- gosec-test: Add #nosec G204 to update_checker.go:740 — scriptPath is
  repoPath+'/startup-oauth.sh', not user input. Eliminates only HIGH finding.
- ai-ml-test: Reduce STACK_DISCOVERY_TIMEOUT_MS 50s→15s, CARD_RENDER_WAIT_MS
  30s→10s. Add health checks to 3 tests that lacked them (disaggregation,
  autoscaler, multi-cluster) so they skip immediately in CI without stacks.
- perf-test: Already fixed by prior commit (1200s override) — nightly at
  06:33 UTC ran before that merge.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
